title: Delivery / portal payload (Phase 0C) — metadata-only certificate projection
description: v0 DRAFT — pending portal co-design sign-off (the portal repo is FENCED; freeze after Wave-B review). The render-ready, METADATA-ONLY projection of a parity certificate + finding SUMMARIES that a consumer (the portal) renders. It is NOT the certificate and NOT the finding_set: it is a redacted, content-addressed summary produced by spec-engine/deliver.py via project(certificate, finding_set) -> payload (SEMANTICS.md sec 12). Built by ALLOWLIST: only the fields named here are copied in. It carries NO raw evidence, NO source text, NO secrets, NO finding `message`, and NO fetchable internal URLs — every ref is a digest/id, never an http(s) URL the portal would fetch (SSRF-safe). It is a DIGEST-BEARING record: its top-level `digest` is the canon `semantic-content` digest with `digest` excluded from its own preimage (canon sec 8) — no new canon profile is introduced. NO JSON FLOATS. See SEMANTICS.md sec 12 + OPEN-5.

payload_schema_version.description: Version of THIS payload schema. Starts at "0" to signal v0-draft status; bumps to "1" on portal co-design sign-off (post Wave-B). A hashed field — it travels inside the payload `digest`.

schema_version.description: The CERTIFICATE schema version copied verbatim from certificate.schema_version (currently "1"). Carried so a consumer knows which certificate contract this delivery summarizes.

projection_algo_version.description: P/N projection+parity algorithm version, copied from the certificate. Pins reproducibility of the underlying result.

canon_version.description: canon contract version, copied from the certificate.

idmodel_version.description: idmodel contract version, copied from the certificate.

kind_alignment_version.description: kind-alignment.json version, copied from the certificate.

permitted_freedom_vocab_version.description: permitted-freedom-vocab.json version, copied from the certificate.

certificate_digest.description: The certificate's authoritative identity (its top-level `digest`). The portal replay-verifies the rendered delivery against the stored certificate by THIS digest (canon sec 9 verbatim replay). A digest, NOT a fetchable URL (OPEN-5: exact byte-match domain co-designed with the portal).

ec_revision_id.description: Realized-side revision id, copied from the certificate. A provenance id, not fetchable.

spec_revision_digest.description: Spec/desired revision digest, copied from the certificate.

desired_graph_digest.description: canon semantic-content digest of S, copied from the certificate.

ec_digest.description: canon semantic-content digest of E(C), copied from the certificate.

ec_reproducible.description: Whether E(C) is byte-reproducible, copied from the certificate (defaults true when the certificate omits it).

advisory.description: Derived render hint = NOT ec_reproducible. When true the delivery is ADVISORY and the portal MUST NOT gate on it (parity over a non-reproducible E(C) is meaningless).

code_head_sha.description: Code repo HEAD sha the E(C) was extracted from, copied from the certificate. A provenance pin.

overall_result_state.description: Aggregated state, copied VERBATIM from the certificate (never recomputed here). The load-bearing truth; `badge` is a convenience derived from it.

badge.description: Derived render hint. green IFF overall_result_state == pass. fail -> failing. unknown/unsupported -> non_green. not_applicable -> neutral (explicitly NON-GREEN; SEMANTICS.md 'never silently green'). The portal may restyle but MUST NOT render anything other than overall_result_state==pass as passing.

dimension_results.description: Per-dimension states (state-only), copied verbatim from the certificate for at-a-glance rendering. Exactly one entry per parity_dimension.

checks_evaluated.description: Optional count, copied from the certificate's dimension_result if present. A metadata count, not evidence.

finding_summaries.description: One render-ready summary per finding in the referenced finding_set. METADATA-ONLY: NO message, NO evidence_refs, NO source, NO secrets. `title` is derived from the stable machine `code`, never from the finding `message`.

findings_ref.description: Digest pointer to the full finding_set (pointer, not payload). Equals the certificate's findings_ref. A digest, not a fetchable URL.

waivers_ref.description: Optional digest pointer to the waivers in effect, copied from the certificate iff present. Pointer, not payload. Waived findings remain non-pass in finding_summaries (their waiver_ref is set).

digest.description: The payload's content-address: canon `semantic-content` digest = lowercase hex SHA-256 over `spec-canon:v2:semantic-content\n` || canonical_bytes(payload-without-this-top-level-`digest`-field). Excluded from its own preimage (canon sec 8). No separate hashed id field (would be circular). Named `digest` so canon's top-level digest-exclusion fires automatically, mirroring the certificate.

locator.description: Reserved NON-HASHED envelope (canon sec 10) for volatile/provenance render data (wall-clock rendered_at, portal display labels). v0 carries none; changing these MUST NOT change `digest`.

finding_summary.title: finding_summary
finding_summary.description: A metadata-only projection of a finding. Carries the load-bearing identity (finding_id, dimension, result_state, code) + a code-derived title + an SSRF-safe location ref. EXCLUDES message, evidence_refs, confidence, and any source/secret field.

finding_id.description: The finding's stable id (a digest), copied verbatim. A pointer into the finding_set, not fetchable.

code.description: The stable machine code of the finding (e.g. prohibition_violated), copied verbatim. Machine-stable, carries no incident detail.

title.description: Human-readable label DERIVED FROM `code` (a fixed code->title map in deliver.py), NOT from the finding `message`. The message is explicitly non-meaning-bearing and is the field most likely to carry incident detail; it is never copied.

location.description: An SSRF-safe location ref: idmodel digests/ids only (desired_logical_id Tier-1, realized_occurrence_id Tier-2), plus the kinds. NO file path, NO line, NO URL, NO source. Absent if the finding subject carries no location.

desired_logical_id.description: idmodel Tier-1 logical id (a digest). Not fetchable.

realized_occurrence_id.description: idmodel Tier-2 occurrence id (a digest). Not fetchable.

realized_source.description: The extractor source label (e.g. greenfield/treesitter-chunker). A provenance label, not a path or URL.

waiver_ref.description: If the finding is currently suppressed by a waiver, the waiver_id (a digest). The finding's result_state STAYS non-pass (a waiver never flips to pass; SEMANTICS.md sec 8). Pointer, not payload.
